cards.back: A brute force algorithm that tries all possible solutions to a problem
A classic problem in combinatorial optimization where the goal is to find the shortest possible tour that visits a set of cities and returns to the origin city
A method of solving a problem by trying all possible solutions and choosing the best one
A measure of the amount of time an algorithm takes to complete, usually expressed as a function of the size of the input
A measure of the amount of memory an algorithm uses, usually expressed as a function of the size of the input
